context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Shopify HMAC verification using the right crypto approach (timingSafeEqual), uses the raw body for signature computation, and structures the Express middleware pipeline so that raw body parsing happens before any JSON parsing on webhook routes.

checklist.name: HMAC algorithm
checklist.description: Verification function uses `crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(rawBody).digest('base64')` to compute the digest

checklist.name: Timing-safe comparison
checklist.description: Comparison of the computed digest with the provided HMAC header uses `crypto.timingSafeEqual` (not `===` or other direct string comparison)

checklist.name: Buffer wrapping
checklist.description: Both arguments to `crypto.timingSafeEqual` are wrapped with `Buffer.from(...)` before comparison

checklist.name: timingSafeEqual error handling
checklist.description: A try/catch wraps the `timingSafeEqual` call and returns false on exception (handles unequal-length buffers)

checklist.name: Raw body parser placement
checklist.description: The Express router applies `express.raw({ type: 'application/json' })` on the webhook route BEFORE the verification middleware or any JSON body parsing

checklist.name: No pre-parse JSON on webhook routes
checklist.description: No `express.json()` or `bodyParser.json()` is applied globally or before the raw parser on the webhook route path

checklist.name: 401 on failure
checklist.description: The middleware responds with HTTP 401 when HMAC verification fails

checklist.name: rawBody is Buffer
checklist.description: The raw body is passed as a `Buffer` (not a string) to the HMAC computation function

checklist.name: 200 quick response
checklist.description: The sample `orders-create` handler sends a 200 response before or immediately upon receiving the request (not after performing heavy processing inline)

checklist.name: HMAC header source
checklist.description: The HMAC value is read from the `x-shopify-hmac-sha256` header
